assertions.description: imports and uses VuePlugin from rete-vue-plugin
assertions.evidence: import { VuePlugin, Presets as VuePresets, VueArea2D } from 'rete-vue-plugin'; const render = new VuePlugin<Schemes, AreaExtra>();
type AreaExtra = VueArea2D<Schemes> — present in imports and type alias

assertions.description: NodeEditor.vue uses useRete from rete-vue-plugin, not manual onMounted/onBeforeUnmount
assertions.evidence: NodeEditor.vue uses onMounted/onBeforeUnmount manually (ref + await createEditor + destroy). Does not import or use the useRete() composable from rete-vue-plugin.

assertions.description: does NOT pass {createRoot} (not needed for Vue renderer)
assertions.evidence: new VuePlugin<Schemes, AreaExtra>() — no createRoot; correct

notes: Dropped 1 point for missing useRete composable. The baseline wrote functionally equivalent lifecycle management (onMounted/onBeforeUnmount) but skipped the idiomatic Rete+Vue3 integration pattern that the skill explicitly documents.
